# AI News Hub

> AI News Hub is a primary-source feed for AI news: official RSS and Atom posts from the major labs, deduplicated, ranked into an editorial feed, and linked straight to the source — never rewritten. Live coverage: OpenAI, Google DeepMind, Hugging Face, NVIDIA AI, Amazon AI, Alibaba Qwen, IBM Research, and DeepSeek.

## Tech Stack

- **Framework**: Astro 6 (static output)
- **Runtime**: Bun 1.x
- **UI**: React 19 islands with the React Compiler
- **Styling**: TailwindCSS 3.4 with CSS-variable design tokens
- **Data**: Supabase (PostgreSQL) for live articles + a static provider cache (`/data/provider-articles.json`)
- **Fetching**: TanStack React Query 5
- **Types**: TypeScript 5.9

## Project Structure

- [Source Code](https://github.com/JonathanRReed/ai-news): Main repository
- **Pages**: `index.astro` (3-tier feed), `digest/` + `digest/[week].astro` (weekly "This Week in AI"), `models.astro` (release timeline), `article/[id].astro` (per-article pages with NewsArticle JSON-LD), `about.astro`, `contact.astro`, `privacy.astro`
- **Layout**: `/src/layouts/Layout.astro` (shared head, SEO, header/footer)
- **Components**: `/src/components/` — ArticlesIslandWrapper, ArticleListIsland, FiltersIsland, CompanySelect, DigestView, Header, Footer, HamburgerMenu, FaqDropdown
- **Hooks**: `/src/hooks/` — useArticles, fetchArticlesPage, useArticlesContext, useReadState
- **Lib**: `/src/lib/` — companyCatalog, providerSources, articleTags (topic/entity tagging), digest, feeds
- **Feed builder**: `scripts/gather-provider-feeds.mjs` (refreshed daily by `.github/workflows/refresh-feeds.yml`)

## Key Features

- **Editorial feed**: a lead story + top stories + a time-bucketed river, ranked by a transparent recency/provider/release score
- **Topic facets**: data-derived chips (Releases, Agents, Infra & hardware, Multimodal, Tooling, Research); multi-select and URL-encoded for shareable views
- **Read state**: localStorage seen/saved with All / Unread / Saved views
- **Keyboard navigation**: j/k move, o open, s save, m mark read, / search, ? help
- **Weekly digest** and a **model release timeline**
- **Primary-source links**: every card and article page links to the original publisher

## Feeds and data

- [RSS — all](/feed.xml)
- [JSON — all](/articles.json)
- Per-company RSS: `/feed/company/{slug}.xml`
- Per-topic RSS: `/feed/topic/{slug}.xml`
- [Sitemap](/sitemap-index.xml)

## Development

- **Install**: `bun install`
- **Dev**: `bun run dev`
- **Build**: `bun run build`
- **Preview**: `bun run preview`
- **Lint**: `bun run lint`
- **Refresh feed cache**: `bun run gather:providers`

## Deployment

- **Production URL**: https://ai-news.helloworldfirm.com
- **Publisher**: Hello.World Consulting (https://helloworldfirm.com)
- **Hosting**: Cloudflare Pages (static)
